static.name: POET Technologies Inc.
static.description: POET Technologies Inc., together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells semiconductor products and services for commercial applications in the United States, Canada, the rest of North and South America, Europe, Malaysia, Singapore, China, and the rest of Asia. The company offers photonic integrated packaging solutions based on the POET Optical Interposer, a platform that allows the integration of electronic and photonic devices onto a single chip using advanced wafer-level semiconductor manufacturing techniques. Its products include photonic integrated circuits, optical engines, optical transceiver modules, and light source products. The company serves the data center AI, light source, and telecommunications markets; 5G interconnect markets, such as PON and GPON, as well as edge computing for machine-to-machine communications; and sensing markets, including LIDAR, Optical Coherence Tomography for medical devices, and virtual reality systems. The company was formerly known as Opel Technologies Inc. and changed its name to POET Technologies Inc. in June 2013. POET Technologies Inc. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.

claude.thesis: Photonic integration for AI data center optical interconnects Massive upside if optical interposer achieves commercial scale, but extremely early-stage

news.headline: POET Technologies (POET) Posts Q1 2026 Results
news.summary: POET Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:POET) is one of the Best Semiconductor Stocks to Buy Under $30. On May 14, the company released its Q1 2026 results, wherein it posted non-recurring engineering and product revenue of $503,389 compared to $166,760 in Q1 2025 and $341,202 in Q4 2025.
